title: Rental Deposit Assistance * Slavic Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Rental Deposit Assistance * Slavic Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Agricultural Laborers AIDS/HIV Families with Children Foster Children Homeless Veterans Homeless Youth Homelessness Issues LGBTQ2+ Individuals Medicaid Recipients Native American Community * Homelessness Issues Older Adults Pregnant Individuals Slavic Community Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF IMPACT NW IMPACT NW DANCING TREE RESOURCE CENTER HOUSING AND RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects community members to the Coordinated Entry Systems for housing in Multnomah, Washington, Clackamas, and Clark Counties. Housing/rental assistance is reserved only for households referred to us by the Coordinated Entry Systems. Staff work with each household to develop an individual support plan to identify goals and strategies designed to help achieve housing stability. 10055 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Low-income families and individuals who are homeless or at risk of homelessness. Special focus on the Slavic community. Hours: Not accepting appointments Email (503) 721-1740 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMPACT NW HOUSING AND RENTAL ASSISTANCE
